CustomField.description: Self-referential lookup linking a lifecycle Opportunity (Committed-Spend or Expansion) back to the Opportunity it was spawned from (LAND -> Committed-Spend -> Expansion). Populated by the lifecycle Flow.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Oportunidad de la que se originó este registro en el ciclo LAND → Committed-Spend → Expansion. La completa automáticamente el Flow de ciclo de vida.
CustomField.label: Source Opportunity
